title: T-024 — Site decommission modal with V-MS-21 pre-condition gates (MS-104, BL guard)
prompt:
# T-024 — Site decommission modal

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10B MS-104, §11.6 V-MS-21, §14.4 BRCGS+FSMA 204
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:577-633 (site_decommission_modal)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §M-10

## Goal
Destructive archival modal that decommissions a site after V-MS-21 pre-condition gates clear. Type-to-confirm site_code (case-sensitive) + Admin-only + writes 7-year retention audit entry; emits site_decommissioned outbox event.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-decommission-modal.tsx — shadcn Dialog with dismissible={false}, pre-condition checklist (each item red+actionable link if unmet), type-to-confirm input, Decommission button disabled until all conditions clear + input matches site_code.
2. Server Action decommissionSite(siteId, confirmCode):
   - V-MS-21 server-side re-check (re-query, not trust client) of 4 pre-conditions: no open WOs (work_orders.state IN_PROGRESS/PLANNED), no in-transit ISTs (transfer_orders.state in {shipped, in_transit, planned}), no open quality holds (quality_holds.released_at IS NULL), no users whose only site_user_access is this site.
   - Assert sites.is_default=false (per V-MS-03 — default site cannot be decommissioned).
   - Assert role=admin.
   - Set sites.active=false; mark all site_user_access for this site active=false; mark all replication_conflicts site-scoped resolved with reason='site_decommissioned'.
   - Write audit_events row with 7-year retention tag (retention_class='regulatory_7y').
   - Emit site.decommissioned outbox event.
3. Server Component pre-computes checklist counts and passes as props (not fetched client-side).
4. Tests: V-MS-21 negative paths each (open WO blocks, in-transit IST blocks, quality hold blocks, only-site user blocks) + V-MS-03 default-site block + happy path + audit retention tag + outbox event emitted.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-decommission-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_actions/decommission-site.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_actions/compute-decommission-preconditions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/__tests__/site-decommission-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_actions/__tests__/decommission-site.test.ts [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the modal opens, when compared to modals.jsx:577-633 (site_decommission_modal), then dismissible=false, checklist with action links, type-to-confirm input, Decommission button gated — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given the site has 3 open WOs, when checklist renders, then 'Close N WO(s)' line is red with deep-link to /production/wo?site=siteId&state=in_progress and Decommission button stays disabled.
3. Given all pre-conditions are clear but the input value != site_code, when Decommission is clicked, then button is disabled (no click).
4. Given the input matches site_code and all checklist clear, when decommissionSite settles, then sites.active=false, all site_user_access rows for site_id set active=false, replication_conflicts site-scoped resolved with reason='site_decommissioned'.
5. Given the site is_default=true, when decommissionSite is invoked, then V-MS-03 DefaultSiteCannotBeDecommissioned is thrown — even before V-MS-21 checks.
6. Given decommissionSite settles, when audit_events is queried, then 1 row exists with action='site_decommissioned', retention_class='regulatory_7y', actor=user_id.
7. Given decommissionSite settles, when warehouse_outbox_events is queried, then exactly 1 row 'site.decommissioned' exists with payload {site_id, decommissioned_at, actor_user_id}.
8. Given user role != admin, when decommissionSite is invoked, then UnauthorizedDecommission is thrown.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + V-MS-21 4 negative + V-MS-03 default-site + V-MS-21 happy path + audit retention + outbox + role gate before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run site-decommission-modal' + Playwright site-decommission.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:577-633 (site_decommission_modal).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not trust client-side pre-condition counts — Server Action MUST re-query.
- Do not allow case-insensitive type-to-confirm — site_code match must be exact (case-sensitive).
- Do not allow dismissible Dialog — onInteractOutside/onEscapeKeyDown preventDefault per §10B MS-104.
- Do not purge data — D-MS-3 archive-only; historical traceability preserved.
- Do not skip 7-year retention tag — BRCGS+FSMA 204 §5.2/§14.4 compliance.
- Do not allow decommissioning is_default=true site (V-MS-03 short-circuit).

Given all pre-conditions clear but input != site_code, when Decommission clicked, then button disabled; AND given is_default=true when decommissionSite invoked then V-MS-03 DefaultSiteCannotBeDecommissioned thrown; AND given user role != admin when decommissionSite invoked then UnauthorizedDecommission thrown.
Given input matches site_code and all clear, when decommissionSite settles, then sites.active=false, site_user_access rows active=false, replication_conflicts site-scoped resolved.

Given decommissionSite settles, when audit_events queried, then 1 row action='site_decommissioned', retention_class='regulatory_7y', actor=user_id; AND given decommissionSite settles when warehouse_outbox_events queried then 1 row 'site.decommissioned' emitted.
